meta.title: 6. The Threat To ICS with Rob Lee
meta.description:
As always Rob has an entertaining and informative session on what most casual observers want to hear about: who is attacking whom and how are they doing it?

You get a lot of that in this video, and pay special attention when Rob starts to talk about Intelligence Consumption at 34:30 in the video. This is the key if you are an asset owner.

Questions To Consider & Comment On?

1) What are your bias related to threat?

2) How can you integrate threat intelligence into your ICSsec program? (admittedly this is a long and not easy question) What should you do when you learn of a new ICS attack?
